title: Persistent Goal-Seeking Intelligence Accumulation Engine
thesis: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension is an experimental framework for a persistent, goal-seeking, self-improving intelligence system that accumulates capabilities, evidence, and economic value over time.
problem: Most AI work is transient: prompts, outputs, and one-off tasks are lost instead of becoming institutional capability.
mission: Make every accepted proof into durable institutional memory: capability, evidence, credential, reputation, and reusable context.
why: Persistent accumulation is the bridge from useful AI work to sovereign RSI.
rsi: Accepted artifacts become candidate operating context for future work. Unproven artifacts remain outside the system memory that shapes future missions.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates the work that creates, validates, and settles proof-bearing artifacts while the Chronicle preserves what may influence future missions.
